description_long: This is a striking red sports car with a sleek, aerodynamic body and bold black racing stripes running from the hood to the rear. The car features a low, wide stance, accentuated by large, white five-spoke alloy wheels and a streamlined roofline. The front end is aggressive, with a wide grille and dual round headlights, while the rear showcases a full-width taillight bar and a subtle integrated lip spoiler. The side profile reveals two doors, flush door handles, and a fuel cap on the left rear quarter panel. The windows are tinted black, and the car's overall design suggests high performance and modern styling. The materials appear to be primarily painted metal, glass, and rubber, with likely leather and plastic elements inside.
description: A red sports car with black racing stripes, white five-spoke wheels, and a sleek, modern design. It features two doors, tinted windows, and an aggressive front and rear profile.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the bold black stripes on the hood, aggressive grille, and large white wheels.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the full-width taillight, subtle rear lip spoiler, and visible license plate area.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the two-door coupe profile, fuel cap, and continuous black stripe along the side.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the dual round headlights, wide grille, and the car's low, sporty stance.
